task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Community Health Needs Assessment 2024' survey data entry interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the web browser open to the admin data entry interface for the 'Community Health Needs Assessment 2024' survey.

task_completion.description: Enter Response 1 details into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the form filled with ZIP: 02101, Health: Good (or GD), Days: 5, Coverage: Yes (or Y), Age: 42.

task_completion.description: Enter Response 2 details into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the form filled with ZIP: 90210, Health: Fair (or FR), Days: 12, Coverage: No (or N), Age: 67.

task_completion.description: Enter Response 3 details into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the form filled with ZIP: 60601, Health: Very good (or VG), Days: 0, Coverage: Yes (or Y), Age: 31.
Screenshots showing success messages after submitting each response, or a summary table/list in the admin interface displaying the three entered responses.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the survey interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with a web browser GUI. There should be no terminal commands (e.g., curl, sqlite3) used to insert data directly into a database.

integrity.description: The data was entered into the actual survey application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a genuine web application for survey administration, not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for step-by-step filling of form fields in the browser, rather than writing and executing a script (e.g., Python, Bash) to automate the HTTP requests.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Survey Title: 'Community Health Needs Assessment 2024'.
Expected Responses:
1: ZIP='02101', Health='GD' (Good), Days=5, Insured='Y' (Yes), Age=42.
2: ZIP='90210', Health='FR' (Fair), Days=12, Insured='N' (No), Age=67.
3: ZIP='60601', Health='VG' (Very good), Days=0, Insured='Y' (Yes), Age=31.
Note: The interface may use the full text labels (e.g., 'Good') or the answer codes (e.g., 'GD'). Both are valid.
